headline: Momentum has been named  Ad Age’s Experiential Agency of the Year
summary: NEW YORK, March 11, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Momentum has been named Ad Age’s A-List & Creativity Awards Experiential Agency of the Year for 2026, marking a first for the agency. Ad Age cited Momentum’s exceptional performance in 2025, during which the agency retained 100% of its clients and won 70% of new business pitches. The agency added GEICO, Arby's and Hyatt to its roster. "We are honored to be recognized as Ad Age's Experiential Agency of the Year," said Global CEO Donnalyn Smith at Momen
